OG Yuzu Strawberry Sorbet 350ml

RM55.00 MYR

From Japan, the tangy yuzu meets the ever sweet strawberry, makes for a perfect light cooling citrus treat!

• Packs with complementary cooler bag
• Order by 3pm for same day delivery, by 6pm for same day pickup
− +
 
 This item is a recurring or deferred purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted.
Allergen & Ingredients

Allergen: No

Ingredients:
Glucose Powder, Lemon Puree, Sugar, Stabiliser, Strawberry Puree, Water, Yuzu Puree

Travel & Storage

Last up to 45 minutes inside the cooler bag upon delivery or pick-up.

Store immediately in the freezer at -18°C for at least 30 minutes before serving

Serving Tips

Gelato too hard? Thaw for 5-10 minutes at room temperature or 15-20 minutes in the fridge before serving.

For Cakes:
Use a sharp stainless steel knife warmed with hot water, wiping off excess water to avoid ice crystals.

Best Before

Consume within 7 days for the best quality and freshness.

Expiry 3 weeks from the date of receiving if kept frozen at -18°C.
